ref: Jesus asked, “Who is my mother and who are my brothers?”
text: Zɛmɛ ba naa funɛ kani a go un, o fun pɛɛsi ba, “Anti ya mu niin wuti awa mu niinbisa?”
translated: Unable to translate the provided text due to insufficient information.

ref: Can worry make you live longer?
text: Ma anti la zi gbaari o bunsa a li muksi daha?

ref: Listen carefully to what you hear! The way you treat others will be the way you will be treated—and even worse.
text: “Maa nu chenani n kaa ŋɔ ma nan. Ma doso a nu mu sɛma a gbaari, Koosa zi suŋi mau ma zim a gbaari.

ref: Now listen! A farmer went out to scatter seed in a field.
text: “Baal digi funɛ nyɛn doon a fun si a kaali o ŋmaha di o la zaasi kiduha.

ref: Stay awake and pray that you won't be tested. You want to do what is right, but you are weak.”
text: Ma si a il a kisumi Koosa, chen ni sintana wa zi wa mur ma ma tiŋ o nɔ. Ma tusa daŋni ma ya chenani mu sɛm chenu, amaa ma bara vɛ kpoki.”
